free_text: Fragment mass and kinetic energy distribution for the
photofission of 235U and 238U with 25- MeV end-point
bremsstrahlung
Electron on a 0.5 mm thick W target
UF4 targets (65 and 105 ug/cm2 thick) on a 58 ug/cm2
VYNS and 10 ug/cm2 Au support
UF4 targets (100 ug/cm2 thick) on a 50 ug/cm2 VYNS
and 10 ug/cm2 Au support
Two Ortec F series heavy ion detectors (CF-090-
600-60) with a depletion depth 60 um placed in a back
to back arrangement at 90 deg with respect to the
beam direction and at a distance of 5 cm from the beam
axis
Ayano Makinaga + LV
FWHM of TKE distribution
The absolute error is estimated to be 1.5
to 2.0 MeV due to uncertainties in the thickness of
VYNS of the 252Cf calibration source, to the error
associated with the gamma flash subtraction, and to
inhomogeneities in the thickness of the target (VYNS
and material)
